segments: : مَنْ أَدْمَنَ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ ق وَسَّعَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ فِی رِزْقِهِ وَ أَعْطَاهُ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ حَاسَبَهُ حِساباً یَسِیراً
arabic.text: : مَنْ أَدْمَنَ فِی فَرَائِضِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ قِرَاءَهَ سُورَهِ ق وَسَّعَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ فِی رِزْقِهِ وَ أَعْطَاهُ کِتابَهُ بِیَمِینِهِ* وَ حَاسَبَهُ حِساباً یَسِیراً

segments: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi al-Mi’za from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: Whoever has been reciting Surah Qaaf in his obligatory and supererogatory prayers Allah would grant addition and increase in his livelihood, his record of Deeds would be in his right hand and (on the Day of Judgment) his accounting would be in an easy and peaceful way.
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. From the previous chain from al-Hassan from Abi al-Mi’za from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: Whoever has been reciting Surah Qaaf in his obligatory and supererogatory prayers Allah would grant addition and increase in his livelihood, his record of Deeds would be in his right hand and (on the Day of Judgment) his accounting would be in an easy and peaceful way.

narratorChain.raw: بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ عَنْ أَبِی الْمِعْزَی عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ
